title: E-Commerce Growth Specialist (f/m/d)
required_skills: 2-4 years experience in digital marketing, e-commerce, or analytics
Hands-on experience with landing pages, newsletters, and campaign execution
Familiarity with e-commerce metrics (conversion, order value, retention)
matched_skills: Digital marketing and e-commerce experience (Moli Media, IPC, GRG)
Campaign execution and product marketing (IPC go-to-market, Moli Media campaigns)
KPI analysis and ROI reporting (Power BI, Looker Studio, Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting)
Analytics platforms (Power BI, Google Looker Studio, SAP Analytics)
E-commerce platform experience (Moli Media e-commerce/live-stream agency)
core_responsibilities: Plan and execute marketing activities including landing page creation, newsletter campaigns, and on-site promotions
Analyze campaign performance and webshop KPIs (traffic, conversion, order value) to recommend improvements
Coordinate with sales and marketing teams to align messaging and timing
Support e-commerce projects and learn how ERP/webshop systems enable growth
Contribute to pricing, discount, and campaign discussions from a performance and growth perspective
culture_keywords: eager to learn, experiment, and make an impact
friendly, open, and inclusive working culture
recommended_emphasis: Highlight e-commerce campaign execution experience at Moli Media (campaigns, content strategy, ROI analysis)
Emphasize KPI/analytics capabilities: Power BI, Looker Studio, KPI dashboards, ROI reporting
Showcase cross-functional coordination skills (HSBC digital transformation, Hapag-Lloyd sprints)
Frame B2B go-to-market experience (IPC, GRG) as directly relevant to B2B webshop growth
Mention English proficiency (C1) and international work experience prominently
If applicable, mention any experience with email/newsletter tools or landing page platforms
